arg.name: enabled
arg.summary: The show of the monitor is opened or closed.

method.name: ListModes

arg.name: modes
arg.summary: The list of modes that element contains id, width, height and refresh_rate.

method.description: Get the list of modes supported by this monitor.

method.name: ListPreferredModes

arg.name: preferred_modes
arg.summary: The list of preferred modes that element contains id, width, height and refresh_rate.

method.description: Get the list of preferred modes by the monitor.

arg.name: mode
arg.summary: The current used mode that element contains id, width, height and refresh_rate.

method.name: SetModeById
method.description: Set mode by id in property modes.

method.name: SetPosition
method.description: Set the position within the screen region..

method.name: SetRotation
method.description: Set the rotation by value in property rotations.

method.name: SetReflect
method.description: Set the reflection by value in property reflects.

property.name: id
property.description: Indicates the Output id associate with this monitor.

property.name: name
property.description: Indicates the Output name associate with this monitor.

property.name: connected
property.description: Indecates whether the hardware was able to detect a monitor device connected to this output.

property.name: enabled
property.description: The show of the monitor is opened or closed.

property.name: x
property.description: Indicates the position of this CRTC within the screen region.

property.name: y
property.description: Indicates the position of this CRTC within the screen region.

property.name: rotation
property.description: The current rotation. Rotation can be one of 'normal', 'left', 'right' or 'inverted'. This causes the output contents to be rotated in the specified direction.

property.name: reflect
property.description: The current reflection. Reflection can be one of 'normal' 'x', 'y' or 'xy'. This causes the output contents to be reflected across the specified axes.

property.name: rotations
property.description: Contains the set of rotations supported by the CRTC.

property.name: reflects
property.description: Contains the set of reflections supported by the CRTC.

property.name: modes
property.description: All avaliable modes which element contains width, height and refresh rate. For exapmle: [(1920,1080, 60.0),(1680, 1050, 59.95)].

property.name: npreferred
property.description: The first npreferred modes in modes are preferred by the monitor in some way; for fixed-pixed devices, this would generally indicate which modes match the resolution of the output device.
